# Emmy Safaris & Tours

Emmy Safaris & Tours is an award-winning, family-run tour operator based in Arusha, Tanzania. We specialise in tailor-made Tanzania safaris, Kilimanjaro climbing expeditions, and Zanzibar beach holidays.

## Website
https://emmysafaris.com

## Contact
- Address: AICC, Arusha, Tanzania
- Phone: +255 769 683 062
- WhatsApp: +255 784 305 008
- Email: info@emmysafaris.com

## What We Offer
- **Safari Packages:** 2 to 10+ day itineraries covering Serengeti, Ngorongoro Crater, Tarangire, Lake Manyara and the Great Migration.
- **Kilimanjaro Climbs:** Lemosho, Machame, Marangu, Rongai (5 & 6–7 day) and Umbwe routes with KINAPA-certified guides.
- **Zanzibar Holidays:** Spice tours, Stone Town, Mnemba Atoll, Safari Blue, sunset dhow cruises and beach escapes.
- **Accommodation:** Carefully selected lodges and luxury tented camps across Tanzania.
